productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat M2 Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, the puma cat range of Puma everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. UpperPremium leather upper for longer wearLightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfortAsymmetrical lacing system gives a snug FitTextile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfortEmbroidered formstripe on the lateral footMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort, impact protection and stabilityOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced tractionEmbedded puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsoleOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guardshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
